originalTitle: AI Bubble vs. Dot Com Crash. History Is Repeating
content: Enjoy the videos and music you love, upload original content, and share it all with friends, family, and the world on YouTube.
chineseTitle: AI 泡沫与互联网泡沫。历史正在重演
chineseContent: 欣赏您喜爱的视频和音乐，上传原创内容，并在 YouTube 上与朋友、家人和全世界分享。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
